summary.intent: Create a README for Gossamer (a desktop Claude Code session manager) and fix a Prisma CLI error that occurred during new repo onboarding.
summary.outcome: README written with sections on features, Entire.io integration, privacy, setup instructions, and coming soon items; the --skip-generate flag was removed from the prisma db push call after it was dropped in Prisma 7.

repo: Gossamer is an Electron app with a separate server component and UI, using Prisma with SQLite for local storage.
Session history is stored in the local git repository and can be pushed to a user's remote.
The app integrates with Entire.io to link Claude Code sessions with git commits.
Project is located at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer with a prisma.config.ts for Prisma configuration.

code.finding: Used `prisma db push --skip-generate` for onboarding new repos; --skip-generate was removed in Prisma 7 and caused a fatal error.

workflow: Prisma 7 dropped the --skip-generate flag from `db push`; the correct command is now just `prisma db push`.
The README setup flow includes: install deps, build, db push, then run — db push must work cleanly for onboarding to succeed.

friction: New repo onboarding crashed due to --skip-generate being removed in Prisma 7, blocking first-run setup for new users.
Coming soon section initially included features (native text search) that were already implemented, requiring a correction pass.
open_items: Homebrew install mentioned as 'coming soon' but not yet implemented.

Several UI/server files (App.tsx, Layout.tsx, api.ts, SessionRow.tsx, ActiveSessions.tsx, serve.ts) were modified but their changes are not described in the transcript — unknown if related work is complete.
